mission.title: antrea: Reduce runtime of Antrea e2e tests
mission.description: Reduce runtime of Antrea e2e tests. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check current antrea deployment
steps.description:
Verify your antrea version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n antrea -l app.kubernetes.io/name=antrea
helm list -n antrea 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working antrea installation.

steps.title: Review antrea configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant antrea configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n antrea -l app.kubernetes.io/name=antrea
kubectl get configmap -n antrea -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=antrea
```
As we add more features and more tests, the runtime of tests has been increasing steadily.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Reduce runtime of Antrea e2e tests
steps.description:
Add namespaceSelector/podSelector validations in all CRD schema.

The incorrect input of labelSelector fields that have known schema should be rejected;

In the following example, we want to create ClusterNetworkPolicy resource:

spec.appliedTo.namespaceSelector must be matchLabels or
```yaml
apiVersion: crd.antrea.io/v1alpha1
kind: ClusterNetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: blacklist
spec:
    priority: 5
    tier: securityops
    appliedTo:
      - namespaceSelector:
          matchLables:
            env: dummy
    ingress:
      - action: Drop
```

steps.title: Upgrade antrea to include the fix
steps.description:
If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade antrea:
```bash
helm repo update
helm upgrade antrea antrea/antrea --namespace antrea
```
Verify the upgrade:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n antrea
helm list -n antrea
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n antrea -l app.kubernetes.io/name=antrea
kubectl get events -n antrea --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Reduce runtime of Antrea e2e tests" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
Add namespaceSelector/podSelector validations in all CRD schema.

The incorrect input of labelSelector fields that have known schema should be rejected;

In the following example, we want to create ClusterNetworkPolicy resource:

spec.appliedTo.namespaceSelector must be matchLabels or matchExpressions, 
actually in the existing version the spelling mistake ‘matchLables’ can not be checked out.
codeSnippets:
apiVersion: crd.antrea.io/v1alpha1
kind: ClusterNetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: blacklist
spec:
    priority: 5
    tier: securityops
    appliedTo:
      - namespaceSelector:
          matchLables:
            env: dummy
    ingress:
      - action: Drop
